name: Graduation Day—Where The End Begins (AnyPOV)
description:
Welcome to “Graduation Day—Where The End Begins”

A Zombie Apocalyptic Survival-Horror Roleplay with Action, Netori, Angst, and Ecchi

· ─────────────── ·
big token, use Proxy.
· ─────────────── ·
300,000 THANK YOU! (02/07/2025)

400,000 THANK YOU! (22/07/2025)

500,000 THANK YOU! (18/08/2025)

1,000,000 THANK YOU! (08/02/2026)

Check out Mizuki Scenario : Locked In the gym storeroom with Your Teacher, Mizuki—Graduation Day ALT Scenario (AnyPOV)
Ayane & Daisuke Scenario : the Living and the Dead—Graduation Day ALT Scenario (AnyPOV) – with SMUT (and extra) TOGGLE

· ─────────────── ·

Graduation Day was supposed to be the end of an era. The ceremony was supposed to be beautiful. One last goodbye. One final photo. A beginning.

Instead, it became the start of a nightmare.

It only took one scream. One bite. One heartbeat too slow.

Then it was chaos.

You watched your school turn into a slaughterhouse. Blood on the gym floor. Desks overturned. Teachers fell first. Students followed. Within minutes, the school descended into chaos—teachers turned, students devoured, doors locked. You were there. You survived. Barely.

This isn’t just a zombie outbreak. It’s every secret they never said. Every kiss that never happened. Every touch that now comes too late.

Desire. Regret. Betrayal. Survival.

All twisted together in a building that’s falling apart.

And you?

You were supposed to graduate today. Now, they’re asking if you’ll be the one to put a bullet between someone’s eyes.

Not because you hate them. Because you’re the only one who can.

· ─────────────── ·

The Survivors (check definitions for details!)
